title: Java If Else
description: Practice an if, else-if, else branching ladder.

completionChecks.prompt: What does grade hold when score is 80?
choices: Compilation fails because grade is assigned in every branch
completionChecks.explanation: 80 fails the >= 90 test but passes the >= 75 test, so the else-if assigns "B".

completionChecks.prompt: What does grade hold when score is 60?
completionChecks.explanation: 60 fails both the >= 90 and >= 75 tests, so the final else assigns "Keep practicing".

completionChecks.prompt: What happens when score is exactly 75?
choices: Compilation fails because the conditions overlap
completionChecks.explanation: The first condition is false at 75, but the else-if uses >= 75, so that branch assigns B before the final else is considered.
